Part.Source:
&XmlReader.OpenFromString(&NFeCCeArqXml) &ret = &XmlReader.ReadType(1, 'procEventoNFe') if &ret <> 0 &SdtCartaCorrecao.versao = &XmlReader.GetAttributeByName('versao') //versão endif &XmlReader.Close()
//LEITURA RETORNO PROTOCOLO do 'retEvento'
&XmlReader.OpenFromString(&NFeCCeArqXml) &ret = &XmlReader.ReadType(1, 'infEvento') if &ret <> 0 &XmlReader.Read()
//LEITURA XML Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infEvento' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xCorrecao' &SdtCartaCorrecao.xCorrecao = &XmlReader.Value EndCase
&XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo
&XmlReader.Close() EndIF
//xCorrecao
Sub 'retEvento' &XmlReader.OpenFromString(&NFeCCeArqXml) &ret = &XmlReader.ReadType(1, 'retEvento') if &ret <> 0 &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'retEvento' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'infEvento' &XmlReader.Read() Do while &XmlReader.Name <> 'infEvento' Do Case Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpAmb' &SdtCartaCorrecao.tpAmb.FromString(&XmlReader.Value) Case &XmlReader.Name = 'chNFe' &SdtCartaCorrecao.chNFe = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'dhRegEvento' &SdtCartaCorrecao.dhRegEvento = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nProt' &SdtCartaCorrecao.nProt = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'tpEvento' &SdtCartaCorrecao.tpEvento = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'nSeqEvento' &SdtCartaCorrecao.nSeqEvento = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'cStat' &SdtCartaCorrecao.cStat = &XmlReader.Value Case &XmlReader.Name = 'xMotivo' &SdtCartaCorrecao.xMotivo = &XmlReader.Value EndCase &XmlReader.Read()
if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif EndDo //</infProt> EndCase &XmlReader.Read() if &XmlReader.EOF Exit endif
EndDo //</protNFe> endif &XmlReader.Close() EndSub
